warnings: mode=adiabatic: each oxidation state was geometry-optimized separately and the potential uses ΔE between the relaxed geometries (includes reorganization). It does NOT include ZPE/thermal/entropy (ΔE used in place of ΔG); use mode=freq for a true ΔG.

Solvation is implicit/continuum only (or gas phase) — no explicit solvent shell and no Born–Haber solvation cycle. Semi-empirical redox potentials are screening-grade (≈±0.3–0.5 V); even DFT here omits the explicit-solvation correction. Treat as a screening estimate.

E°(vs SHE) uses E_abs(SHE) = 4.281 V. The absolute SHE potential is convention-dependent (literature ≈4.28–4.44 V); this is a systematic offset on the reported potential. Override with --e-abs-she to match your reference convention.

Single-conformer result: every species was evaluated at ONE geometry, with no conformational/Boltzmann averaging. For a flexible molecule the Boltzmann-averaged free energy over conformers can differ from a single conformer by several kcal/mol — shifting pKa by >1 unit, E° by >0.1 V, and logP by >0.5. If the molecule has rotatable bonds, run conformer-search first and average, or treat this as a screening estimate tied to the input geometry.

prose:
Adiabatic standard redox potential (E°) for the duroquinone 0 / –1 couple, computed with the chemkit redox-potential skill.

Method provenance
• Property: Adiabatic ΔE-based standard redox potential, V vs SHE (no ZPE/thermal corrections)
• Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding)
• Geometry: each oxidation state (charge 0 / multiplicity 1 and charge –1 / multiplicity 2) was individually geometry-optimized at the same GFN2-xTB level with xTB’s built-in optimizer (both optimizations converged).
• Solvent / environment: ALPB implicit water (continuum only, no explicit solvent).
• Reference electrode: SHE, using |e|E_abs(SHE) = 4.281 V (chemkit default).
• Charge / multiplicity: oxidized 0 / 1; reduced –1 / 2.
• Software: xTB via chemkit (version as bundled in current chemkit backend).
• Convergence: both optimizations converged; integrity check returned “trustworthy: true”.
• Live log: calculation streamed to redox_20260625-115446.out (path provided at run time).

Result
E°(GFN2-xTB, water, vs SHE) = 4.5148057 V

Caveats and warnings: see list above — notably, this is a ΔE (not ΔG) single-conformer estimate using an implicit solvent model and a semi-empirical Hamiltonian, so treat as a screening-grade value (expected uncertainty ≈0.3–0.5 V).
